textByHash.dc9cd4e7f6ab992190094f4bebf456aa16126c82: Nilsal, adventurer. Do you wish to return to Varrock?
textByHash.e081e54972893945cbeec4ce1772efb3bc480ecc: Well let's see... Come to think of it, there was this one person carrying some sort of case...
textByHash.a4bae2f076525341578255de0d42a572f8c81ca5: He came along and asked if he could have a go with my bird.
textByHash.c6c89e4475a8828677c3e8835ed4eabfa4905c30: Yes, I thought it was quite strange. I told him no, and he made his way east, towards the Cothon.
textByHash.073e00d9cbbf630c272747c88db6f0abc5a21465: Just that man I already told you about. He headed east, towards the Cothon.
textByHash.477a7f780132869ad24a24ffe2d38fa60d3f94dd: Ah, kuani! Well you'll be pleased to know that Prince Itzla has already granted me permission to give you your very own quetzal, free of charge!
textByHash.6249e934fa5f42170673aca337041cc1a34cd412: That's right! And I've already picked out the perfect one. This here is Renu. She finished training not too long ago and has been eagerly awaiting her first rider.
textByHash.bb56c1bac02b90aabd16e1f3b90f21d147451d6a: Now, Renu here isn't as experienced as Primio, so don't expect her to be taking you too far. However, she's more than capable of flying anywhere in Varlamore, provided there's somewhere suitable to land.
textByHash.45996d8ee16eefbe798aeb8a9dd28cdad7a84c13: You'll find that we already have plenty of landing sites all across the kingdom, and more are being built all the time. You could probably even build a few of your own if you wanted.
textByHash.fdc23460faa4c16dbe6e0037120617283d50bfc9: Now, why don't you two properly introduce yourselves to each other. I have the perfect thing here to help with that.
textByHash.ab116838a8a33373ee97fe98239ff6d6471543fa: Have you properly introduced yourself to Renu yet? She'll be able to take you right there!
textByHash.be8a00cd4243729daeca6615eca77e8983c38369: Have you properly introduced yourself to Renu yet? She'll be able to take you right there! Here, I'm sure this will help the two of you become firm iknamis.
textByHash.344c322ee6f463d4be8afac8fec410157dabfd72: Kuani! I reckon she'll let you ride her now.
textByHash.23098739493dcc39334f3d1caae2b0216ab71d66: You have everything you need to get there already. Renu will be able to take you!
textByHash.f8fae24eb188f694f696d2402846fb7e249a7cc4: Nilsal, adventurer. The name is Regulus Cento, one of the quetzal keepers for the Royal Family of Varlamore.
textByHash.48fccea9df40f4381a51d387b149bca3dcef832a: Well just look here to my dear companion, Primio, and you'll have your answer. Varlamore is a large and diverse kingdom, but thanks to our quetzals, navigating it is as straightforward as can be.
textByHash.8d1b8457f06e2cb54799271379d4a18455bfe6e7: You're not wrong there. Nothing beats taking to the skies.
textByHash.ef24a99dac4d412107cb81da8b6ea1206d769132: Speaking of which, Crown Prince Itzla Arkan has asked Primio and I to escort you to our capital city of Civitas illa Fortis, or Fortis as we prefer to call it. Is that something you'd be interested in?
textByHash.60d72da74aaffc2edf89ec943e27583b27ccaf33: Excellent! Now, I know Prince Itzla is very keen to meet with you once we reach the capital, so he's sending the Tullus twins to greet you on arrival. I'll be sure to point them out to you once we're there.
textByHash.b6628835b22390eac08351035494c9dd82c195e8: So, ready for your first journey to Varlamore?
textByHash.050626e059ac4222b632906ca4d5d44ca0f1352b: Kuani! We will depart at once.
textByHash.645477d346a827893f21a02cad59bdb27f0f7553: Well, here we are! Welcome to Fortis!
textByHash.7392ef09930653d38744d45927d0b168f3a4828f: I'm glad you think so! Now, I'm sure you're keen to get exploring, but Prince Itzla is very keen to meet with you first.
textByHash.24a2d4aaf1135e6899c525bc8ae95f42fa161d4e: Yes, the Tullus twins. That's them just to the west, by the stairs up to the palace. Why don't you head on over and introduce yourself?
textByHash.bf58c802b9c41f62bb21d3aa9b21ddd07db41785: Very well. I will wait for you here.
textByHash.04aca67dee5fd8a98548afb1ad99035c3efb892d: Nilsal, adventurer. Are you ready for your first journey to Varlamore?
textByHash.1f470b82db283d161d50395a6b0277c3cb890e86: Nilsal, adventurer. Do you wish to travel to Fortis?
textByHash.8e702d23c11fa42ca550bef4707331b4af6bfdcd: Then we will depart at once.
textByHash.00e90e143dd94b5b486c62a2229e9795eb837d85: Look's like you won't be taking to the skies just yet though...
